subject: Cannot open shared cloud link — permission error
description: Browser shows access denied or sign-in loop when opening colleague's OneDrive link.

ts_steps.title: Incognito test
ts_steps.action: Open link in private window; sign in with work account explicitly.

ts_steps.title: Request access
ts_steps.action: Use 'Request access' on error page; owner re-shares with correct org.

ts_steps.title: Correct link type
ts_steps.action: Ensure 'people in org' vs 'specific people' matches recipient; link not expired.

internal_information: Guest vs member, cross-tenant sharing disabled, or link scoped to wrong email. Not Entra-only fix path — generic sharing UX.
